title: Trump Says U.S. Doesn’t Need Allies to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
summary_full: President Trump has faced mounting criticism over the U.S.-Israeli assault on Iran from allies and even members of his own administration.
summary_public: President Trump has faced mounting criticism over the U.S.-Israeli assault on Iran from allies and even members of his own administration.
